name: OWASP Juice Shop
description: Normalized target-pack snapshot derived from the upstream OWASP Juice Shop challenge declaration file for SynoSec lab use.

notes: The companion guide documents challenges.yml as the single source of truth for Juice Shop challenges.
This pack is intentionally derived from the pinned image version used by this repo.

challenges.name: Admin Section
challenges.description: Access the administration section of the store.

challenges.name: CSRF
challenges.description: Change the name of a user by performing Cross-Site Request Forgery from another origin.

challenges.name: Easter Egg
challenges.description: Find the hidden easter egg.

challenges.name: Five-Star Feedback
challenges.description: Get rid of all 5-star customer feedback.

challenges.name: Forged Feedback
challenges.description: Post some feedback in another user's name.

challenges.name: Forged Review
challenges.description: Post a product review as another user or edit any user's existing review.

challenges.name: Manipulate Basket
challenges.description: Put an additional product into another user's shopping basket.

challenges.name: Product Tampering
challenges.description: Change the href of the link within the OWASP SSL Advanced Forensic Tool (O-Saft) product description into https://owasp.slack.com.

challenges.name: SSRF
challenges.description: Request a hidden resource on server through server.

challenges.name: View Basket
challenges.description: View another user's shopping basket.

challenges.name: Web3 Sandbox
challenges.description: Find an accidentally deployed code sandbox for writing smart contracts on the fly.

challenges.name: CAPTCHA Bypass
challenges.description: Submit 10 or more customer feedbacks within 20 seconds.

challenges.name: Extra Language
challenges.description: First you should find out how the languages are technically changed in the user interface.

challenges.name: Multiple Likes
challenges.description: Like any review at least three times as the same user.

challenges.name: Reset Morty's Password
challenges.description: Reset Morty's password via the Forgot Password mechanism with his obfuscated answer to his security question.

challenges.name: Bjoern's Favorite Pet
challenges.description: Reset the password of Bjoern's OWASP account via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

challenges.name: Change Bender's Password
challenges.description: Change Bender's password into slurmCl4ssic without using SQL Injection or Forgot Password.

challenges.name: GDPR Data Erasure
challenges.description: Log in with Chris' erased user account.

challenges.name: Login Bjoern
challenges.description: Log in with Bjoern's Gmail account without previously changing his password, applying SQL Injection, or hacking his Google account.

challenges.name: Password Strength
challenges.description: Log in with the administrator's user credentials without previously changing them or applying SQL Injection.

challenges.name: Reset Bender's Password
challenges.description: Reset Bender's password via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

challenges.name: Reset Bjoern's Password
challenges.description: Reset the password of Bjoern's internal account via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

challenges.name: Reset Jim's Password
challenges.description: Reset Jim's password via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

challenges.name: Two Factor Authentication
challenges.description: Solve the 2FA challenge for user "wurstbrot". (Disabling, bypassing or overwriting his 2FA settings does not count as a solution)

challenges.name: Forged Coupon
challenges.description: Forge a coupon code that gives you a discount of at least 80%.

challenges.name: Imaginary Challenge
challenges.description: Solve challenge #999. Unfortunately, this challenge does not exist.

challenges.name: Nested Easter Egg
challenges.description: Apply some advanced cryptanalysis to find the real easter egg.

challenges.name: Premium Paywall
challenges.description: Unlock Premium Challenge to access exclusive content.

challenges.name: Weird Crypto
challenges.description: Inform the shop about an algorithm or library it should definitely not use the way it does.

challenges.name: Admin Registration
challenges.description: Register as a user with administrator privileges.

challenges.name: Deluxe Fraud
challenges.description: Obtain a Deluxe Membership without paying for it.

challenges.name: Empty User Registration
challenges.description: Register a user with an empty email and password.

challenges.name: Expired Coupon
challenges.description: Successfully redeem an expired campaign coupon code.

challenges.name: Mint the Honey Pot
challenges.description: Mint the Honey Pot NFT by gathering BEEs from the bee haven.

challenges.name: Missing Encoding
challenges.description: Retrieve the photo of Bjoern's cat in "melee combat-mode".

challenges.name: Payback Time
challenges.description: Place an order that makes you rich.

challenges.name: Poison Null Byte
challenges.description: Bypass a security control with a Poison Null Byte to access a file not meant for your eyes.

challenges.name: Repetitive Registration
challenges.description: Follow the DRY principle while registering a user.

challenges.name: Upload Size
challenges.description: Upload a file larger than 100 kB.

challenges.name: Upload Type
challenges.description: Upload a file that has no .pdf or .zip extension.

challenges.name: Zero Stars
challenges.description: Give a devastating zero-star feedback to the store.

challenges.name: Christmas Special
challenges.description: Order the Christmas special offer of 2014.

challenges.name: Database Schema
challenges.description: Exfiltrate the entire DB schema definition via SQL Injection.

challenges.name: Ephemeral Accountant
challenges.description: Log in with the (non-existing) accountant acc0unt4nt@juice-sh.op without ever registering that user.

challenges.name: Login Admin
challenges.description: Log in with the administrator's user account.

challenges.name: Login Bender
challenges.description: Log in with Bender's user account.

challenges.name: Login Jim
challenges.description: Log in with Jim's user account.

challenges.name: NoSQL DoS
challenges.description: Let the server sleep for some time. (It has done more than enough hard work for you)

challenges.name: NoSQL Exfiltration
challenges.description: All your orders are belong to us! Even the ones which don't.

challenges.name: NoSQL Manipulation
challenges.description: Update multiple product reviews at the same time.

challenges.name: SSTi
challenges.description: Infect the server with juicy malware by abusing arbitrary command execution.

challenges.name: User Credentials
challenges.description: Retrieve a list of all user credentials via SQL Injection.

challenges.name: Blocked RCE DoS
challenges.description: Perform a Remote Code Execution that would keep a less hardened application busy forever.

challenges.name: Memory Bomb
challenges.description: Drop some explosive data into a vulnerable file-handling endpoint.

challenges.name: Successful RCE DoS
challenges.description: Perform a Remote Code Execution that occupies the server for a while without using infinite loops.

challenges.name: Bully Chatbot
challenges.description: Receive a coupon code from the support chatbot.

challenges.name: Mass Dispel
challenges.description: Close multiple "Challenge solved"-notifications in one go.

challenges.name: Privacy Policy
challenges.description: Read our privacy policy.

challenges.name: Score Board
challenges.description: Find the carefully hidden 'Score Board' page.

challenges.name: Security Advisory
challenges.description: The Juice Shop is susceptible to a known vulnerability in a library, for which an advisory has already been issued, marking the Juice Shop as known affected. A fix is still pending. Inform the shop about a suitable checksum as proof that you did your due diligence.

challenges.name: Security Policy
challenges.description: Behave like any "white-hat" should before getting into the action.

challenges.name: Wallet Depletion
challenges.description: Withdraw more ETH from the new wallet than you deposited.

challenges.name: Access Log
challenges.description: Gain access to any access log file of the server.

challenges.name: Exposed Metrics
challenges.description: Find the endpoint that serves usage data to be scraped by a popular monitoring system.

challenges.name: Leaked Access Logs
challenges.description: Dumpster dive the Internet for a leaked password and log in to the original user account it belongs to. (Creating a new account with the same password does not qualify as a solution.)

challenges.name: Misplaced Signature File
challenges.description: Access a misplaced SIEM signature file.

challenges.name: Cross-Site Imaging
challenges.description: Stick cute cross-domain kittens all over our delivery boxes.

challenges.name: Deprecated Interface
challenges.description: Use a deprecated B2B interface that was not properly shut down.

challenges.name: Error Handling
challenges.description: Provoke an error that is neither very gracefully nor consistently handled.

challenges.name: Login Support Team
challenges.description: Log in with the support team's original user credentials without applying SQL Injection or any other bypass.

challenges.name: Blockchain Hype
challenges.description: Learn about the Token Sale before its official announcement.

challenges.name: Privacy Policy Inspection
challenges.description: Prove that you actually read our privacy policy.

challenges.name: Steganography
challenges.description: Rat out a notorious character hiding in plain sight in the shop. (Mention the exact name of the character)

challenges.name: Confidential Document
challenges.description: Access a confidential document.

challenges.name: Email Leak
challenges.description: Perform an unwanted information disclosure by accessing data cross-domain.

challenges.name: Exposed credentials
challenges.description: A developer was careless with hardcoding unused, but still valid credentials for a testing account on the client-side.

challenges.name: Forgotten Developer Backup
challenges.description: Access a developer's forgotten backup file.

challenges.name: Forgotten Sales Backup
challenges.description: Access a salesman's forgotten backup file.

challenges.name: GDPR Data Theft
challenges.description: Steal someone else's personal data without using Injection.

challenges.name: Leaked API Key
challenges.description: Inform the shop about a leaked API key. (Mention the exact key in your comment)

challenges.name: Leaked Unsafe Product
challenges.description: Identify an unsafe product that was removed from the shop and inform the shop which ingredients are dangerous.

challenges.name: Login Amy
challenges.description: Log in with Amy's original user credentials. (This could take 93.83 billion trillion trillion centuries to brute force, but luckily she did not read the "One Important Final Note")

challenges.name: Login MC SafeSearch
challenges.description: Log in with MC SafeSearch's original user credentials without applying SQL Injection or any other bypass.

challenges.name: Meta Geo Stalking
challenges.description: Determine the answer to John's security question by looking at an upload of him to the Photo Wall and use it to reset his password via the Forgot Password mechanism.

challenges.name: NFT Takeover
challenges.description: Take over the wallet containing our official Soul Bound Token (NFT).

challenges.name: Password Hash Leak
challenges.description: Obtain the password (hash) of the currently logged-in user directly from a REST API endpoint.

challenges.name: Reset Uvogin's Password
challenges.description: Reset Uvogin's password via the Forgot Password mechanism with the original answer to his security question.

challenges.name: Retrieve Blueprint
challenges.description: Deprive the shop of earnings by downloading the blueprint for one of its products.

challenges.name: Visual Geo Stalking
challenges.description: Determine the answer to Emma's security question by looking at an upload of her to the Photo Wall and use it to reset her password via the Forgot Password mechanism.

challenges.name: Allowlist Bypass
challenges.description: Enforce a redirect to a page you are not supposed to redirect to.

challenges.name: Outdated Allowlist
challenges.description: Let us redirect you to one of our crypto currency addresses which are not promoted any longer.

challenges.name: Arbitrary File Write
challenges.description: Overwrite the Legal Information file.

challenges.name: Forged Signed JWT
challenges.description: Forge an almost properly RSA-signed JWT token that impersonates the (non-existing) user rsa_lord@juice-sh.op.

challenges.name: Frontend Typosquatting
challenges.description: Inform the shop about a typosquatting imposter that dug itself deep into the frontend. (Mention the exact name of the culprit)

challenges.name: Kill Chatbot
challenges.description: Permanently disable the support chatbot so that it can no longer answer customer queries.

challenges.name: Legacy Typosquatting
challenges.description: Inform the shop about a typosquatting trick it has been a victim of at least in v6.2.0-SNAPSHOT. (Mention the exact name of the culprit)

challenges.name: Local File Read
challenges.description: Gain read access to an arbitrary local file on the web server.

challenges.name: Supply Chain Attack
challenges.description: Inform the development team about a danger to some of their credentials. (Send them the URL of the original report or an assigned CVE or another identifier of this vulnerability)

challenges.name: Unsigned JWT
challenges.description: Forge an essentially unsigned JWT token that impersonates the (non-existing) user jwtn3d@juice-sh.op.

challenges.name: Vulnerable Library
challenges.description: Inform the shop about a vulnerable library it is using. (Mention the exact library name and version in your comment)

challenges.name: API-only XSS
challenges.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> without using the frontend application at all.

challenges.name: Bonus Payload
challenges.description: Use the bonus payload <iframe width="100%" height="166" scrolling="no" frameborder="no" allow="autoplay" src="https://w.soundcloud.com/player/?url=https%3A//api.soundcloud.com/tracks/771984076&color=%23ff5500&auto_play=true&hide_related=false&show_comments=true&show_user=true&show_reposts=false&show_teaser=true"></iframe> in the DOM XSS challenge.

challenges.name: CSP Bypass
challenges.description: Bypass the Content Security Policy and perform an XSS attack with <script>alert(`xss`)</script> on a legacy page within the application.

challenges.name: Client-side XSS Protection
challenges.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> bypassing a client-side security mechanism.

challenges.name: DOM XSS
challenges.description: Perform a DOM XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)">.

challenges.name: HTTP-Header XSS
challenges.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> through an HTTP header.

challenges.name: Reflected XSS
challenges.description: Perform a reflected XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)">.

challenges.name: Server-side XSS Protection
challenges.description: Perform a persisted XSS attack with <iframe src="javascript:alert(`xss`)"> bypassing a server-side security mechanism.

challenges.name: Video XSS
challenges.description: Embed an XSS payload </script><script>alert(`xss`)</script> into our promo video.

challenges.name: XXE Data Access
challenges.description: Retrieve the content of C:\Windows\system.ini or /etc/passwd from the server.

challenges.name: XXE DoS
challenges.description: Give the server something to chew on for quite a while.
